description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Weekly Tests that runs a suite of very-long tests. The workflow should be triggered manually via a workflow dispatch. It consists of multiple jobs: get-date to fetch the current date, get-testlib-very-long-dirs to get directories for testlib-very-long, and two test jobs: testlib-very-long-tests to run very-long tests on self-hosted linux x64 environments and gpu-tests to run GPU tests on a specific container. Each test job should check out the code, cache build results, run tests with specific parameters, and upload test results as artifacts.
